calendar.matters:
JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Vanessa Martinez.
Dept: 514. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kaquishka Turner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
Christina Cheuk, Supportive Housing Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Vanessa Martinez.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Unlawful Detainer was filed on December 20, 2019.
Defendant Andrew Stewart filed his answer to the complaint on December 26, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on January, 10, 2020, setting trial for today, January 27, 2020.
No DOE defendants named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, and against defendant Vanessa Martinez, as follows:

JUDGMENT IS FOR POSSESSION ONLY.

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution & Possession of the premises located at 459 Turk Street, Room #324, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The rental agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing is present. Represented by Christina Check.
Attorney Kaquisha Turner appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Vanessa Martinez is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of January 27, 2020 remains on calendar.
